name: ASMR Runner
short_description: A single-player game blending ASMR and action. Immerse yourself in 3D sound and race through four stages while dodging unique sound-producing objects! Headphones recommended.
detailed_description:
If you love ASMR or enjoy immersive sound experiences, and you're looking for a unique blend of sound and action, ASMR Runner is for you.

ASMR Runner is a single-player action game that combines the soothing elements of ASMR with thrilling gameplay. Using Unreal Engine 5's 3D sound technology, we've created a realistic binaural audio experience. For the best experience, we highly recommend playing with headphones or earphones to fully immerse yourself in the world of sound.

Take control of your character and navigate through four exciting stages, avoiding various objects that produce unique 'sounds.' Your skill in sensing and reacting to sound will be tested as you race towards the goal.

Step into this one-of-a-kind sound world and take on the challenge!

Streaming and Content Creation Policy: We welcome gameplay streaming and monetization of ASMR Runner. However, please refrain from recording or streaming content from the "Sleep Mode" that appears after completing the game.
